title: narcissus linnaeanus var. pratensis
intro: Narcissus linnaeanus var. pratensis is a perennial plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, commonly known as a type of wild daffodil. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant. The health benefits of Narcissus linnaeanus var. pratensis include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions or tinctures, are often used to treat various ailments, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
